Description: Seat rotation with 4 people; jam/runaway/pinch = major safety incident
Mitigation: Dual mech+elec limits; rotation alert tone; independent review; >=100-cycle test; on-site engineer

Description: 14 client parts need specs in 15 working days; delay blocks dev
Mitigation: 15-day obligation; interface tracker; parallel non-dependent work; start on arrival

Description: 5 screens + lights/mech/seat/audio sync; high load = lag/glitch; >=8h no restart
Mitigation: DC headroom >=8 (rec 16) cores; async queue; per-scene load test; degrade strategy; video fallback

Description: 7 teams parallel; complex deps (styling->frame->mechanism->software); any slip cascades
Mitigation: Dependency graph at start; critical-path buffer; weekly review; dedicated coordination

Description: Sensors are ES samples; noisy show may destabilize accuracy; audience expects real data
Mitigation: Set A/B boundary in design; real if stable else written approval for simulated; visual tolerance
Custom protective packaging; resettable mounts; adjustable mating faces; spare parts; on-site gap manual

Description: Unstable show power; system must recover demo-ready in 5 min; UPS >=5 min
Mitigation: UPS redundancy; auto-recovery (state persistence); recover A-class first; power-loss drill

Description: Confirm (M1/W5) precedes data/mechanism/CMF; >2 review rounds compresses data phase
Mitigation: Pre-align before review; clear opinion list + change boundary per round; M1 delay = impact analysis + extension

Description: Quiet show; mechanism noise >45dB hurts experience
Mitigation: Noise test at prototype; lubrication+damping; noise acceptance method

Description: High background noise; recognition may fall far below 95%
Mitigation: Mic array + directional pickup; on-site noise test; panel touch as voice fallback

Description: Per-zone DC13V/NTC/<=70C; long run may overheat
Mitigation: NTC over-temp auto-cut verified; tiered alarm (60C alert/70C cut); on-site inspection

Description: B-class ES; backlight pattern may be faint under strong ambient light
Mitigation: Lower ambient light for S3; test under varied light; written fallback

Description: Some parts are ES; production subject to client supply chain
Mitigation: Contracted arrival nodes; standard-dim pre-fab then adjust; extension clause

Description: Front seat must do both zero-gravity and 180-deg rotation; high complexity
Mitigation: Confirm supplier+mechanism early; modes mutually exclusive (reset before rotate); phased

Description: Unload-to-demo <=8h; high demand on install org
Mitigation: Illustrated+video manual; full-flow rehearsal (>=1); arrive 48h early; tools+spares ready

Description: Multi-material seams delta-E <=2.0; hard to control after batch procurement
Mitigation: Confirm swatch first as baseline; measure sample delta-E; reserve CMF rework window

Owner: Plan routing channels in B-surface design; co-design with supplier; dedicated inspection
